misc: Has a habit of getting lost on golf course grounds
Does not spit in the glass
biography: Janne, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is set to make his ninth appearance at the upcoming event. Representing Revontuli Golf, Janne is known among his peers for his generous spirit and unwavering commitment to fair play, qualities that endear him to teammates and competitors alike.

Despite his years of experience, Janne's Achilles' heel remains his occasional navigational challenges on the course. Spectators might spot him momentarily astray, a testament to his adventurous, if occasionally misguided, approach to the game.
Off the course, Janne is a stickler for etiquette, embodying a refined sensibility. Those who know him well can attest that he would never spit in the glass.
